visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a selfie-style medium close-up of a young woman with long black hair, wearing a grey button-up shirt. She has a wide-eyed, surprised facial expression with her mouth open. The setting is a brightly lit indoor space with blurred people and bakery shelves in the background. (2) The scene cuts to an outdoor street view of a bakery called 'libreadry' with a dark green facade and gold lettering. A long line of blurred people is queued up on the sidewalk under overcast daylight. (3) A close-up shot focuses on a black-framed sign with white text that outlines entry restrictions for the store, placed against the glass window of the bakery. (4) The camera pans across various types of bread and pastries displayed on wooden shelves and in baskets inside the store. The lighting is warm and bright, highlighting textures of crusts and toppings like egg, meat, and herbs. (5) Back to the main character indoors, she reacts with an excited and animated facial expression, gesturing with her hands towards the camera. (6) Detailed close-ups of specific breads follow, including white buns topped with green leaves and long baguettes wrapped in plastic. The camera movements are quick and handheld. (7) The woman is shown again in the bakery, touching her chin thoughtfully while looking at the display cases. (8) Close-up shots show trays of golden-brown egg tarts and stacks of salt croissants with visible salt crystals on top. (9) A hand reaches into the frame to pick up a salt croissant from a silver tray. (10) A wide shot shows the busy interior of the bakery with several customers and staff moving through the narrow space. (11) A close-up reveals slices of 'mentaiko French bread' with a bright orange, textured spread on top. (12) A large tray filled with an assortment of bread, including the mentaiko baguette and egg tarts, is carried towards the counter. (13) The setting shifts to an indoor living room where the woman sits on a beige sofa. She holds a salt croissant, looks at it with anticipation, and takes a bite, showing a pleased expression. (14) She then picks up a large slice of mentaiko French bread, takes a significant bite, and reacts with exaggerated wide eyes and hand gestures to her face, indicating extreme enjoyment. (15) She is seen eating an egg tart, her eyes wide with shock and delight, nodding her head as she chews. The background shows a neutral-toned home interior.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 韓國人就傻眼了. (2) [Subtitle]: 每天都在排隊的台北麵包店?. (3) [Subtitle]: 一次只限20個人進去. (4) [Subtitle]: 到底多厲害啊?. (5) [Subtitle]: 首先,. (6) [Subtitle]: 一整排都是沒見過的口味. (7) [Subtitle]: 這種麵包陣容.... (8) [Subtitle]: 太酷了!. (9) [Subtitle]: 眼睛都花了!. (10) [Subtitle]: 聽說這家的蛋塔跟鹽可頌是必吃. (11) [Subtitle]: 重頭戲來了. (12) [Subtitle]: 這家的明太子法國麵包. (13) [Subtitle]: 不知不覺就買成這樣了. (14) [Subtitle]: 就是經典的鹽可頌味. (15) [Variety]: (超級期待). (16) [Subtitle]: 如何. (17) [Subtitle]: 我真的要瘋了. (18) [Subtitle]: 這也太好吃了吧!!!!!!!!. (19) [Subtitle]: 明太子醬很香, 麵包軟Q得剛剛好. (20) [Subtitle]: (男友說要把他剩下的半個蛋塔給我吃). (21) [Subtitle]: 超不爽. (22) [Subtitle]: 一人一顆是基本吧. (23) [Subtitle]: 外皮超薄又酥. (24) [Subtitle]: 蛋塔味道是正常發揮. (25) [Subtitle]: 但麵包們真的太強了!!. (26) [Subtitle]: 回訪願意100% 還有必吃的麵包嗎?

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character, approximately 6 other customers in the bakery and queue, and 3 staff members visible in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a neutral grey button-up shirt and casual clothing.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video transitions between the exterior of a storefront in a city, the crowded interior of a well-lit modern bakery with wooden shelving, and a clean, minimalist residential living room with a beige sofa.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a high-energy, upbeat electronic pop BGM featuring a driving percussive beat and bright synths. The female speaker's voice is high-pitched, loud, and extremely animated, speaking fast with rising intonations that convey intense excitement. (2) As the scene moves outdoors, a subtle low-frequency hum of city traffic is audible beneath the music and speech. The vocal delivery remains high-arousal and energetic. (3) Inside the bakery, there is an audible bed of background chatter and crowd murmurs, creating a busy atmosphere. The speaker's voice remains dominant and clear, maintaining a fast speech rate. (4) A distinct, sharp 'crunch' sound event occurs as the woman bites into the salt croissant at home, marking a high percussive peak in the track. Her vocal reaction is a high-pitched exclamation of joy. (5) Another loud 'crunch' sound is heard as she bites into the mentaiko French bread, followed by several seconds of expressive vocalizations and rapid-fire speech detailing her positive reaction. (6) A final 'crunch' occurs when she bites into the egg tart, followed by more excited speech and high-arousal vocal sounds. The BGM continues consistently throughout the video.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Exploration -> Consumption -> Final Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and recommend specific items from a popular bakery in Taipei. The video uses high-energy visual reactions and auditory cues (like eating sounds) to emphasize the quality and taste of the food, ultimately encouraging viewers to visit.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcasing and positive review of the 'libreadry' bakery's bread and pastries.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses exaggerated facial expressions and loud, crisp eating sound effects to create a highly engaging and sensory-driven food review experience.
